content.text:
Implemented the fix for the v3 HTTP instance list behavior inconsistency.

Summary:
- `InstanceListForm.fillDefaultValue()` no longer fills blank `clusterName` with `DEFAULT`.
- `CatalogServiceV2Impl.listInstances(...)` now only validates cluster existence when `clusterName` is non-blank.
- Blank cluster names are passed through to `ServiceUtil.selectInstances(...)`, matching the gRPC path behavior where blank cluster means “all clusters”.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the blank-cluster failure.
  - It failed before the fix with `cluster  is not found!`.
  - It passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test as requested.
- Re-ran existing test:
  - `./mvnw -pl naming -Dtest=CatalogServiceV2ImplTest#testListInstances test`
  - Result: `BUILD SUCCESS`

Final modified files:
- `naming/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/naming/model/form/InstanceListForm.java`
- `naming/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/naming/core/CatalogServiceV2Impl.java`

No commits were made.
